input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.6.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.6.3
            TITLE: catch cans for the engine coolant system and engine lubrication system must have a minimum

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.6.3: Catch cans for the engine coolant system and engine lubrication system must have a minimum
T.5.6.3 Catch cans for the engine coolant system and engine lubrication system must have a minimum 
capacity of 10% of the fluid being contained or 0.9 liter, whichever is higher

final_answer: Catch cans for the engine coolant system and engine lubrication system must have a minimum capacity of 10% of the fluid being contained or 0.9 liter, whichever is higher
